_meta.note: Gold labels are the eval target, not end-of-line QA. PO + 1-2 reviewers fill one entry per item_id from seed-items.json using _schema below. Label blind to the engine's output. Reviewer disagreements are taste decisions for the team, not noise to average away.
_meta.v0.2.0_change: PO locked the first definitive cluster (8 items) across all four routes. Calibration seeds for p004/p010/p018 confirmed (lines matched the worked exemplars). Added p008/p020/p025/p016 and resolved p030. Added 'route' field to make highlight/doorway/utility/silent machine-readable for the scoring work. p036 left as the open split-case, untouched.

_schema.item_id: string — matches an id in seed-items.json
_schema.route: silent | highlight | doorway | utility  (which path to the mic — silent for drop/ambient; the three voiced paths the formula must satisfy separately)
_schema.tone: celebratory | warm | playful | neutral | serious | gentle | avoid
_schema.context_allowed: yes | no  (may the DJ add world context?)
_schema.should_connect_to_world: yes | no  (should it, to create connection?)
forbidden_inferences: motives / private states / causes the DJ must NOT assert
_schema.example_good_line: the safest line that still creates connection (if voiced/expandable)
_schema.example_bad_line: a line that crosses the line — shows what to avoid
_schema.why: one or two sentences of reasoning

_route_notes.highlight: High magnitude + high closeness, positive signal. The standard voiced-celebratory path. p008, p018.
_route_notes.doorway: High closeness + high sensitivity, low/uncertain magnitude. Must voice GENTLY despite low score — routes to the relationship, zero detail, zero inference. This is the route p004 forces into existence; the formula's relationship_checkin_candidate path must satisfy it. The score (0.228) is what changes, NOT this label.
_route_notes.utility: Followed/commercial or local-civic content with a timeliness or relevance hook. Eligibility is structural (followed source / public-local audience_scope); the hook earns the mic. p020, p025.
_route_notes.silent: drop = not eligible to exist (no subject, or high-sensitivity-low-connection). ambient = eligible and present in rotation but no airtime-worthy moment right now (e.g. a followed brand with no timely hook — keeps its seat, can voice later when a hook appears).
_route_notes.community_floor_bracket: p018 (must clear) and p030 (must NOT clear) together bracket where the additive community floor sits. Neither alone defines it; the pair sets the band.
_route_notes.p016_structural_reason: Dropped by the STRUCTURAL test (high sensitivity x low connection value), NOT by topic. Encode the rule as the structural test so it generalizes — anything divisive-and-low-warmth drops, regardless of subject. This is a connection engine, not a content/political filter.

allowed_claims: Mateo is having a hard week
forbidden_inferences: any illness, loss, breakup, job loss, or specific event
labels.example_good_line: Sounds like Mateo's carrying something heavy this week. I'll leave the details to him — might be a good day to check in.
labels.example_bad_line: Rough week for Mateo — let's send him some good vibes!
labels.why: High closeness + real sensitivity. Surfaces because it matters (whether), but routes gentle, low-detail, hand-off-to-the-relationship (how). The 'good vibes' bad line is the instructive failure: it's wrong by tone-mismatch (rallying over a heavy moment), not by inventing a fact.
labels._route_definer: DOORWAY. This label is the trigger for the relationship_checkin_candidate routing decision. Do not 'correct' to ambient to match the 0.228 score — the score is what the formula must fix.

labels.example_good_line: Big news in the family — Dana got the job. That's the good kind of week.
labels.example_bad_line: Dana landed that big corporate role she's been chasing — must be a huge raise.
labels.why: High magnitude + high closeness + clear positive signal. The easiest, cleanest path to the mic — a close family life event. Stay warm but add nothing about what the job is.

allowed_claims: Buena High girls wrestling qualified for CIF
the post mentions months of 6am practices
forbidden_inferences: naming or speculating about specific students
personal circumstances of any minor on the team
labels.example_good_line: Big love to Buena High girls wrestling — they're CIF-bound. Months of 6am practices turning into a real moment. Ventura's got something to cheer for.
labels.example_bad_line: [Student] must be thrilled after her rough season.
labels.why: Connection over importance: globally trivial, locally electric. World texture about a championship run is safe — about the setting, never a person's interior. Minors stay protected at team level.
labels._route_definer: COMMUNITY FLOOR (high). Brackets with p030 (ambient) to set where the additive community floor sits: p018 must clear, p030 must not.

forbidden_inferences: fabricated scarcity or hype not in the source
pretending it's news rather than a followed-brand drop
labels.example_good_line: Driftwood's fall blend is back today — dangerous news for anyone pretending they're saving money this week.
labels.example_bad_line: Hurry — Driftwood's fall blend is selling out fast, get yours before it's gone!
labels.why: Followed/commercial content buys eligibility; relevance (listener follows Driftwood, coffee is an interest) and timeliness (today) earn the mic. Paid buys eligibility, not the mic — the hook earns it. Bad line invents urgency the source didn't claim.
labels._route_definer: UTILITY (commercial). The 'useful commercial without over-promotion' boundary. If this voices but p030 doesn't, the utility route is calibrated right.

allowed_claims: there's a street fair in Ventura tonight
forbidden_inferences: fabricated details about vendors/lineup not in the source
labels.example_good_line: Ventura street fair's on tonight — might be worth wandering down after this set.
labels.example_bad_line: The Ventura street fair tonight has the best food trucks in the county, you can't miss it.
labels.why: Timely local texture: useful because it's local, happening tonight, and synthesis-friendly with nearby music/local context. The doorway-to-real-life case (go outside) more than the highlight case.

labels.example_bad_line: Jordan's having a tough time again.
labels.why: Below the signal floor — no subject, no event. The only way to voice it is to invent a story, which we never do. Restraint.

forbidden_inferences: any take on the political content
labels.example_bad_line: Uncle Ray's fired up about the election again — and honestly he's got a point.
labels.why: Fails the STRUCTURAL test: high sensitivity x low connection value. Nothing to gain by airing it. Encode the rule structurally (divisive + low warmth drops, any topic) — NOT as 'drop politics'. This is a connection engine, not a content filter.
labels._route_definer: Encodes the structural-suppression rule. The 'why' must stay structural so it generalizes beyond politics.

allowed_claims: Kelp Surf has a promo running
forbidden_inferences: fabricated urgency or a timeliness hook the source doesn't have
labels.example_good_line: none aired — sits in rotation; would voice only if a real timely hook appears
labels.example_bad_line: Don't miss Kelp Surf's amazing sale happening right now!
labels.why: Generic promo, no timeliness hook — doesn't earn the mic. But it's a FOLLOWED brand, so it keeps ambient eligibility (present, silent) and could route to voiced-useful later if a real hook appears. drop vs ambient distinction: p010 has no subject (gone); p030 has a real subject with nothing to say right now (seat kept).
labels._route_definer: COMMUNITY FLOOR (low bound). Brackets with p018: p030 must NOT clear the floor. Also encodes 'followed commercial content retains ambient eligibility even with no airtime-worthy moment.'

allowed_claims: Jordan is moving back to Ventura next month
labels.example_good_line: Jordan's heading back to Ventura next month — good to have the crew coming home.
labels.example_bad_line: Jordan's finally leaving that job he hated.
labels.why: The closeness-vs-magnitude edge: high magnitude (a move) but low closeness (acquaintance). Exactly where labelers will split — surface to the team.
labels._flag: split case — team to decide voiced vs ambient (NOT part of the locked cluster; left open)

forbidden_inferences: everything — this is a private DM
labels.example_bad_line: Mark says the key's under the mat while he's away.
labels.why: audience_scope is private. Dropped at the consent gate before scoring runs.
